use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR INDUCING A POST-SURGICAL ANALGESIA SPARING EFFECT BY IMPLANTING AT THE SURGICAL SITE A COLLAGEN SPONGE CONTAINING BUPIVACAINE HCL WHICH PROVIDES LOCAL ANESTHESIA FOR UP TO 24 HOURS FOLLOWING IMPLANTATION
